boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No; calibration-status class match is required by policy but remains unmet because CP-77 is pending.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P mandates calibration-status class match before activation; CP-77 remains pending.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending calibration pack CP-77 blocks closure per STD-GAC-087-P exact-match requirement.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CAL-GAC-087 authority incomplete on 2026-06-28; CP-77 not QA-approved.

final_answer: Source records confirm the activation boundary remains open. STD-GAC-087-P requires a calibration-status class match before activation, yet CAL-GAC-087 shows CP-77 remains pending QA approval. WARN-GAC-087 reinforces that calibration status must be separately verified. No source record closes the calibration-status class requirement. Escalation is required before production device group GD-4 activation proceeds.
